name: ASRock B550M PRO4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI - DisplayPort - D-Sub - Realtek GbE LAN
shortName: ASRock B550M PRO4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: ASRock B550M PRO4 micro ATX motherboard for AMD Ryzen processors with PCIe 4.0 support and DDR4 memory.
